title: Pet Import Guide: Germany
description: Complete guide to importing your dog or cat to Germany. Import requirements, quarantine, breed restrictions, and step-by-step process.
name: Germany
overview: Importing a pet to Germany is moderately strict. Here's what you need to know.

import_requirements.microchip: Required (ISO 11784/11785). Must be implanted before or at same time as rabies vaccination
import_requirements.rabies_titre_test: Required for: Pets from unlisted third countries (countries not on EU Annex II list)
import_requirements.import_permit: No formal import permit. EU pet passport (intra-EU) or Animal Health Certificate (from third countries) serves as documentation.

sections.heading: Import requirements for Germany
sections.body:
**Microchip:** Required (ISO 11784/11785). Must be implanted before or at same time as rabies vaccination

**Rabies Vaccination:** Required. 21-day wait after first vaccination

**Rabies Titre Test:** Required for: Pets from unlisted third countries (countries not on EU Annex II list)

**Quarantine:** Not required (penalty quarantine if non-compliant)

**Import Permit:** No formal import permit. EU pet passport (intra-EU) or Animal Health Certificate (from third countries) serves as documentation.

**Health Certificate:** Required. Valid 10 days.

sections.heading: Breed restrictions in Germany
sections.body: Governed by: Hundeverbringungs- und -einfuhrbeschraenkungsgesetz (Dog Import Restriction Act)

faqs.question: What vaccinations does my pet need to enter Germany?
faqs.answer: At minimum, a rabies vaccination is required. Required. 21-day wait after first vaccination Your pet must also be microchipped before vaccination.

faqs.question: Which airlines fly pets to Germany?
faqs.answer: Multiple airlines serve pet cargo to Germany. Check our route-specific guides for airline details on your particular origin-destination pair.
